creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Author: olgeni

Log:
  Update Erlang 19 ports to 19.2.

  - Copy BROKEN_* settings from lang/erlang to lang/erlang-runtime19
  - Enable DTRACE by default where possible (PR 215032)

  PR:		215032
  Submitted by:	swills
